checks.finding: All AC-NNN IDs referenced in tasks.md Requirements fields resolve to matching entries in acceptance-tests.md's table. No dangling AC IDs found.
All 11 tasks' Blockers fields use either the literal 'None' or comma-separated T-NNN lists. No ranges or prose found. Matches precheck-result.json's blockers_format_valid: true.
REQ-001 through REQ-011 all appear in at least one task's Requirements field.
AC-001 through AC-017 all appear in at least one task's Requirements field. AC-016 is now solely owned by T-004 after removal from T-002.
All 11 tasks have a non-empty Requirements field citing at least one REQ-NNN ID. No orphan tasks found.
No task title contains 'test', 'spec', or 'verify', and no task's scope is exclusively test-file changes. No orphaned test tasks.
All 11 tasks declare 'Approval: Draft' and 'Status: Planned'. This is attempt 2 round 1 (a re-attempt); the subsequent-round rule is satisfied.
All 11 tasks declare Risk and Required Workflow with correct risk-gate-matrix pairing. Matches precheck-result.json workflow_match_precheck: PASS.

AC-011 is claimed under the Requirements field of both T-001 and T-010 with no differentiated verification in T-001. T-001's Done When list contains no item testing any AC-011 criterion; T-001's own Out of Scope section explicitly excludes 'validate-repository.ps1 expectation updates (T-010)'. Only T-010's Done When actually verifies AC-011. Fix: remove AC-011 from T-001's Requirements field and its traceability-mapping Done-When line, leaving T-010 as sole owner.
Every task ID referenced in a Blockers field exists in dependency-graph.json's nodes array. No dangling task references.
Cycle detection over dependency-graph.json's edges found no cycle. All edges resolve to a valid topological order.
Task titles/scopes joined by 'and' each address one coherent concern. No task connects two distinct, decoupled feature concerns.

T-001's Done When list contains only generic boilerplate with no task-specific item naming a concrete verification command, test file, or evidence artifact for its own scope -- unlike every other task. T-001's Scope describes tests/sdd-domain/contract-schema.Tests.ps1 with valid/corrupt fixtures, but this concrete evidence is never restated as an observable Done-When criterion. Fix: add a Done-When item naming the specific test file and fixture outcomes.

All 11 task IDs appear in traceability.md's Code Target column. All requirement IDs exist in requirements.md. Full-profile layer anchors verified present. Reasoned N/A entries for REQ-004, REQ-006, REQ-008 each state a cross-layer rationale.
